report:
================================================================================
VALIDATION AUDIT SUMMARY
================================================================================

CRITICAL issues:  0
HIGH issues:     3
MEDIUM issues:   0
LOW issues:     0
INFO issues:    2

🟠 HIGH PRIORITY ISSUES FOUND

1. [Computed Fields] mlb_player_stats
   Issue: 1639 rows have NULL ops despite having obp+slg components (3993 rows).
   Fix: Backfill ops for rows with obp+slg available.

2. [Empty Tables] statcast_performances
   Issue: EMPTY but should have data: Statcast ingestion failing due to 502 errors (Task 5).
   Fix: Implement retry logic with exponential backoff (1-2 hours work).

3. [Foreign Keys] position_eligibility
   Issue: 477 orphaned position_eligibility rows (no yahoo_key match).
   Fix: Run fuzzy name matching to link these records to player_id_mapping.

ℹ️  INFORMATIONAL ITEMS

1. [Empty Tables] probable_pitchers
   Note: Empty as expected: BDL API doesn't provide probable pitcher data (Task 4).

2. [Empty Tables] data_ingestion_logs
   Note: Empty by design: Infrastructure exists but logging not implemented (Task 6).


================================================================================
OVERALL ASSESSMENT
================================================================================

✅ GOOD: Minor issues found
   3 issues require attention, but data quality is generally good.
   Address HIGH priority issues before next development phase.

================================================================================
END OF VALIDATION AUDIT
================================================================================
